commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the lint namespace guard with the existing repair guard; maintainer approval is still needed for the broader compatibility/security-boundary change.; Needs attention: The diff mostly preserves existing doctor repair ownership, but the lint path still allows non-core checks to claim unused reserved core doctor IDs.; Review finding: [P2] Reject all reserved core doctor IDs in... commands.review_summary:
The PR moves core doctor structured health checks into ordered doctor contributions, appends bundled/plugin registry checks after core checks for lint, updates repair boundaries, removes the conversion-plan ledger, and adjusts docs/tests.

PR surface: Source -84, Tests +546, Docs +2. Total +464 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source inspection: a plugin-kind check with an unused `core/doctor/*` ID is filtered into `extensionChecks` and passes the lint collision check because the guard only checks the current core ID set.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the lint namespace guard with the existing repair guard; maintainer approval is still needed for the broader compatibility/security-boundary change.
